case_title: QUYEN DUC NIM VS. FRANCESCA APARTMENTS. LP

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION BY PLAINTIFF THAT DEFENDANTS HAVE NOT BEEN SERVED & TO REQUEST NEW HEARING DATE FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIM, QUYEN DUC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-03-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-03-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JAY LIEBERMAN--PROPERTY SUPERVISOR. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2014 - JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION OF NON-SERVICE & REQUEST FOR RESET OF COURT DATE. FILED BY PLAINTIFF NIM, QUYEN DUC
TRIAL RESET TO DEC-03-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-24-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE $65.00 SERVED NOV-18-2014, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCA APARTMENTS. LP
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-24-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-24-2014 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT FRANCESCA APARTMENTS. LP
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY NIM, QUYEN DUC AS TO DEFENDANT FRANCESCA APARTMENTS. LP ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR SEP-24-2014 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF NIM, QUYEN DUC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT FRANCESCA APARTMENTS. LP STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
